items.description:
☆ Brûme Yūrei means "mist ghost"—a soft, layered hair with a cloudy, elegant feel. ☆

Top quality hairs.
https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Category=4&Subcategory=20&CreatorName=Le+Fl%C3%A9au+de+la+Mode&salesTypeFilter=1

☆ you could find recolors of this hair by searching the roman numbers in the community catalog, example "I,II,IV" ☆ 

☆ for the rest of the set search up the color of the set, example "Lilac Mist" for the Lilac Mist set. ☆

Browse the archive.

☆ EST DEC 24 ☆

☆ Modelers of this hair series are either IfHermes or 9ine 🖤. Making art reality.  ☆
